title: taraxacum interveniens
intro: Taraxacum interveniens, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family, characterized by its smaller size and more delicate appearance compared to the common dandelion. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and liver and kidney issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum interveniens include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
